name: Fragile Box
short_description: Fragile Box - this is a physics game in which you play as a ball. Your task is to break the orange cubes and get points for it. You need to avoid red objects that are trying to reach you. If this happens, you will lose. How many points can you get?
detailed_description:
Fragile Box - this is a casual game with using physics where you play as a ball. Orange cubes appear on the playing field and your task is to touch them to break them. For each broken cube, you get a point. The difficulty of the game is that red balls randomly appear on the playing field and try to touch you, if this happens, you will lose and you will need to start over. Also, red balls can push orange cubes, thus complicating your task. How many points can you get?

Features:

- Use of physics

- Interesting gameplay

- Smart enemies

- Relaxing graphics

- Pleasant music

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Japanese
